creator: fneves@registro.br
text:
% uname -a
FreeBSD srv 14.1-RELEASE-p5 FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p5 GENERIC amd64
% zfs list -t snap zroot/home | wc -l
     279
% mount -v | grep @ | wc -l
       0
% ls -l /home/.zfs/snapshot | head
total 4587
drwxr-xr-x  160 root wheel 161 Aug 14 15:20 2024-08-23_00.00.00--5w
drwxr-xr-x  160 root wheel 161 Aug 14 15:20 2024-08-24_00.00.00--5w
drwxr-xr-x  160 root wheel 161 Aug 14 15:20 2024-08-25_00.00.00--5w
drwxr-xr-x  160 root wheel 161 Aug 14 15:20 2024-08-26_00.00.00--5w
drwxr-xr-x  160 root wheel 161 Aug 14 15:20 2024-08-27_00.00.00--5w
drwxr-xr-x  160 root wheel 161 Aug 14 15:20 2024-08-28_00.00.00--5w
drwxr-xr-x  160 root wheel 161 Aug 14 15:20 2024-08-29_00.00.00--5w
drwxr-xr-x  160 root wheel 161 Aug 14 15:20 2024-08-30_00.00.00--5w
drwxr-xr-x  160 root wheel 161 Aug 14 15:20 2024-08-31_00.00.00--5w
% mount -v | grep @ | wc -l
     278

If you list the contents of a snapshot it is expected for it to be automounted but only listing the list of available snapshots is not expected to mount any of them. This is an unexpected behaviour. 13.3 and ZoL systems don't show this behaviour.
